stats.totalProjectsDesc: Number of projects in the system

posts.title: My Posts
posts.description: View publishing results and continue editing existing content.

workspace.createProjectDisabled: Select a workspace where you can create projects before syncing or publishing.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your preferences and account security.

preferences.title: General Settings
preferences.description: Configure the interface language and theme.

account.title: Account Management
account.description: Manage your account and login status.
account.logoutDesc: Sign out of the current admin account on this device.

workspaceMembers.title: Workspace Members
workspaceMembers.description: Manage who can access the selected workspace and what they can do.
workspaceMembers.empty: No members have been added to this workspace.
workspaceMembers.noWorkspace: Select a workspace to manage its members.
workspaceMembers.noPermission: Only workspace owners and admins can manage members.
workspaceMembers.peopleDescription: Owners and admins can update roles or remove members.

roleHelp.member: Can create and edit workspace projects.

header.description: Manage platform interface credentials and publishing prerequisites.

douyin.title: Douyin Creator Center
douyin.description: Scan QR code or log in within the isolated browser. MPP only saves the cookies required for publishing.

wechat.title: WeChat Official Account
wechat.description: Connect via official interfaces using Official Platform developer credentials.
wechat.saved: Saved, leave blank to keep existing
wechat.secretHint: AppSecret will not be displayed; re-enter when modifying again after saving.

guide.title: How to obtain AppID and AppSecret
guide.description: Obtain credentials from WeChat Official Platform development settings and configure IP whitelist according to test error prompts.
guide.step2Desc: If you don't have an official account yet, complete registration following the WeChat Official Platform process.
guide.step2Alt: Click Official Account entry in WeChat Official Platform console
guide.step3: 3. Get Secret and set IP Whitelist
guide.step3Desc: You can save the secret first, click test connection, and then use the IP in the error message to set the whitelist.
guide.step3Alt: Get secret and configure IP whitelist in WeChat Official Platform development settings

zhihu.title: Zhihu Creator Center
zhihu.description: Scan QR code or log in within the isolated browser. MPP only saves the cookies required for publishing.

remoteBrowser.description: Complete official login in the remote browser, then click "I have logged in".
remoteBrowser.success: Cookie saved, account ready for publishing.
remoteBrowser.privacyHint: Original VNC/CDP address will not be displayed or returned.

toast.sessionExpired: Remote browser session expired, please reconnect.
toast.xFailedDesc: Please click the authorize button again.
toast.wechatConnectSuccessDesc: WeChat interface has accepted the current AppID/AppSecret.
toast.xConnectSuccessDesc: X API has accepted the current credentials.
toast.browserStartedDesc: Please complete {{platform}} login in the popup.
toast.browserCancelFailedDesc: The browser session may have already ended.

hints.cookieConnected: Encrypted Cookie saved; will be decrypted at the service boundary and passed to the publisher.
hints.cookieNotConnected: Click connect and complete scan or login on the official page.
hints.remoteBrowserDesc: {{platform}} uses isolated Chromium for login, no need to manually copy cookies or enter passwords into MPP forms.

header.title: Collaboration
header.description: Create or open a collaborative document and edit together in real time.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Your owned and shared collaborative drafts.

editor.readonly: You are opening this document as a viewer. Content updates are disabled.
editor.linkError: Please enter a valid link address

empty.title: No document selected
empty.description: Create a document or select one from the list to start editing.

toast.retryLater: Please refresh and try again later.

header.descCreate: Write your content here, and we will automatically adapt it for each platform.
header.descEdit: Modify current project content and reselect platforms for synchronization.

share.title: Share project
share.description: Invite existing MPP users to help edit or review this project.
share.ownerDescription: Editors can work on content and pre-publish drafts. Publishing and account settings stay with the owner.
share.empty: No collaborators yet. Share this project with an existing user to start.

prepublish.title: Pre-publish
prepublish.description: Click on a platform to enter its exclusive pre-publish block. View original format on the left and preview on the right.
prepublish.pleaseFillContent: Please fill in content before syncing platform drafts.
prepublish.errorSyncFirst: Please sync the platform draft first
prepublish.originalDesc:
Current platform target format: {{format}}.
After clicking sync above, the original format content actually saved to the database will be displayed here.
prepublish.previewPlaceholder: Platform draft hasn't been synced yet; preview will appear after sync.

bar.autoPublishDesc: Check the platforms that need to enter the automatic publishing process here.
bar.fillContentFirst: Please fill in the title and body content before selecting auto-publish platforms.

editor.title: Title
editor.desc: Write body text like a document, switch to preview to see results before publishing

toast.incompleteDesc: Please fill in title and body before publishing.
toast.selectPlatformDesc: Check at least one platform in the publishing channels at the bottom.
toast.syncSuccessDesc: Platform draft adapted and saved by backend.
toast.xWindowBlockedDesc: X post link copied, please paste into browser to open.
toast.xWindowOpenedDesc: Click Post on X page after confirming content.
toast.xWindowFailed: Unable to open X post window
